/usr/bin/cc -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -pipe -fno-plt -fexceptions         -Wp,-D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=3 -Wformat -Werror=format-security         -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection         -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -g -ffile-prefix-map=/run/media/robin/robinScard/codingStuff/arch-unity7/pkgbuilds/unity-indicators/indicator-session/src=/usr/src/debug/indicator-session -flto=auto -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-O1 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now          -Wl,-z,pack-relative-relocs -flto=auto -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/indicator-session-service.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/indicator-session-service.dir/main.c.o" -o indicator-session-service  liblibindicatorsessionservice.a backend-dbus/libbackenddbus.a -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0
